evidence.title: README (segment 2)
evidence.excerpt: If you like OxideTerm, please consider giving it a star on GitHub! ⭐️

evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt:
Zero Electron. Zero OpenSSL. Pure Rust SSH.
One native binary — local shells, SSH, SFTP, remote IDE, AI, port forwarding, plugins, 30+ themes, 11 languages.

evidence.title: README (segment 4)

evidence.title: README (segment 8)
evidence.excerpt: > [!NOTE] > **License Change:** Starting from v1.0.0, OxideTerm has changed its license from **PolyForm Noncommercial 1.0.0** to **GPL-3.0 (GNU General Public License v3.0)**. This means OxideTerm is now fully open source — you are free to use, modify, and distribute it under the terms of the GPL-3.0 license. See the [LICENSE](LICENSE) file for details.

evidence.title: v1.0.4
evidence.excerpt: <!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.4 --> **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AnalyseDeCircuit/oxideterm/compare/v1.0.3...v1.0.4 --- <details><summary>📦 Installation Tips / 安装提示</summary> #### macOS Downloaded `.dmg` files are quarantined by Gatekeeper. Run in Terminal: 下载的 `.dmg` 文件会被 Gatekeeper 隔离，请在终端执行： ```bash xattr -cr ~/Downloads/OxideTerm_*.dmg # or after install / 或安装后 xattr -cr /Applications/OxideTerm.app ``` #### Windows If SmartScreen warns, click **More info → Run anyway**. 若 SmartScreen 弹出警告，点击 **更多信息 → 仍要运行**。 #### Linux ```bash # AppImage chmod +x OxideTerm_*.AppImage && ./OxideTerm_*.AppImage # Debian/Ubuntu sudo dpkg -i oxideterm_*.deb && sudo apt-get install -f ``` </details> [Documentation](https://oxideterm.com) · [Report Issues](https://github.com/AnalyseDeCircuit/OxideTerm/issues) · [Changelog](https://github.com/AnalyseDeCircuit/OxideTerm/tree/main/docs/changelog)

evidence.title: v1.0.3
evidence.excerpt: <!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.3 --> ## New Contributors * @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/AnalyseDeCircuit/oxideterm/pull/3 **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AnalyseDeCircuit/oxideterm/compare/v1.0.2...v1.0.3 --- <details><summary>📦 Installation Tips / 安装提示</summary> #### macOS Downloaded `.dmg` files are quarantined by Gatekeeper. Run in Terminal: 下载的 `.dmg` 文件会被 Gatekeeper 隔离，请在终端执行： ```bash xattr -cr ~/Downloads/OxideTerm_*.dmg # or after install / 或安装后 xattr -cr /Applications/OxideTerm.app ``` #### Windows If SmartScreen warns, click **More info → Run anyway**. 若 SmartScreen 弹出警告，点击 **更多信息 → 仍要运行**。 #### Linux ```bash # AppImage chmod +x OxideTerm_*.AppImage && ./OxideTerm_*.AppImage # Debian/Ubuntu sudo dpkg -i oxideterm_*.deb && sudo apt-get install -f ``` </details> [Documentation](https://oxideterm.com) · [Report Issues](https://github.com/AnalyseDeCircuit/OxideTerm/issues) · [Changelog](https://github.com/AnalyseDeCircuit/OxideTerm/tree/main/docs/changelog)

evidence.title: v1.0.2
evidence.excerpt: <!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.0.2 --> **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/AnalyseDeCircuit/oxideterm/compare/v1.0.1...v1.0.2 --- <details><summary>📦 Installation Tips / 安装提示</summary> #### macOS Downloaded `.dmg` files are quarantined by Gatekeeper. Run in Terminal: 下载的 `.dmg` 文件会被 Gatekeeper 隔离，请在终端执行： ```bash xattr -cr ~/Downloads/OxideTerm_*.dmg # or after install / 或安装后 xattr -cr /Applications/OxideTerm.app ``` #### Windows If SmartScreen warns, click **More info → Run anyway**. 若 SmartScreen 弹出警告，点击 **更多信息 → 仍要运行**。 #### Linux ```bash # AppImage chmod +x OxideTerm_*.AppImage && ./OxideTerm_*.AppImage # Debian/Ubuntu sudo dpkg -i oxideterm_*.deb && sudo apt-get install -f ``` </details> [Documentation](https://oxideterm.com) · [Report Issues](https://github.com/AnalyseDeCircuit/OxideTerm/issues) · [Changelog](https://github.com/AnalyseDeCircuit/OxideTerm/tree/main/docs/changelog)
